name: Generated Test
description: Validate that all rows from CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_SRC_STG_TBL are correctly joined to CCAL_OWNER.TXN based on the business key condition CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_SRC_STG_TBL.TXN_SRC_KEY = CCAL_OWNER.TXN.TXN_SRC_KEY.
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS source_count FROM CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_SRC_STG_TBL
target_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS target_count FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_SRC_STG_TBL WHERE CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_SRC_STG_TBL.TXN_SRC_KEY = CCAL_OWNER.TXN.TXN_SRC_KEY)

name: Generated Test
description: Validate that the TXN_SRC_KEY column in CCAL_OWNER.TXN does not contain NULL values.
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NULL_COUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_SRC_KEY IS NULL

name: Generated Test
description: Validate that the TXN_TP_ID column in CCAL_OWNER.TXN does not contain NULL values.
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NULL_COUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_TP_ID IS NULL

name: Generated Test
description: Validate that the SRC_ENTR_DTM column in CCAL_OWNER.TXN contains valid date values.
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalid_date_count FROM CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_SRC_STG_TBL WHERE SRC_ENTR_DTM IS NULL OR SRC_ENTR_DTM NOT BETWEEN TO_DATE('1900-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('9999-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
target_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalid_date_count FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE SRC_ENTR_DTM IS NULL OR SRC_ENTR_DTM NOT BETWEEN TO_DATE('1900-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('9999-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

name: Generated Test
description: Validate that the RULE_CODE column in CIRD_OWNER.RULE does not contain duplicate values.
source_query: SELECT RULE_CODE FROM CIRD_OWNER.RULE GROUP BY RULE_CODE HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

name: Generated Test
description: Validate that the EFF_FM_DT and EFF_TO_DT columns in CIRD_OWNER.RULE have consistent date ranges (EFF_FM_DT <= EFF_TO_DT).
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalid_date_ranges FROM CIRD_OWNER.RULE WHERE EFF_FM_DT > EFF_TO_DT

name: Generated Test
description: Validate that the FIP_SRC_KEY column in CCAL_OWNER.FIP does not contain NULL values.
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NULL_COUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE FIP_SRC_KEY IS NULL

name: Generated Test
description: Validate that the FIP_ORIG_AMT column in CCAL_OWNER.FIP contains only positive values.
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NEGATIVE_COUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE FIP_ORIG_AMT < 0
